title: May 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 17''' is the 137th day of the year (138th in leap years). There are 228 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 15|''Star Wars Weekly'' 15]] published.
*[[1980]] – The Children's World Premiere of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] is held at the [[Wikipedia:John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts|Kennedy Center]].
*[[1982]] – ''[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 74|''Star Wars'' (1977) 74]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 152|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 152]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 60|''Star Wars Insider'' 60]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 82|''Star Wars Insider'' 82]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – [[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 15|''Poe Dameron'' 15]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars (2015) 31|''Star Wars'' (2015) 31]] published.
*2017 – ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' awarded the title of "[[Wikipedia:MTV Movie Award for Movie of the Year|Movie of the Year]]" at the [[Wikipedia:MTV Movie & TV Awards|MTV Movie & TV Awards]].
*[[2019]] – "[[Darth Vader vs. Hoth Rebels - Crushing the Rebellion]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 34|''Bounty Hunters'' 34]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures: The Nameless Terror 4|''The High Republic Adventures: The Nameless Terror'' 4]] published.
